parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: This enables the connection to the Hokuyo sensor.

parameters.name: port
parameters.label: Serial Port
parameters.description: Selects the COM port that the serial connection will use.  Default port names 1 through 8 are available in the popup menu, though any name can be manually entered in this field.

parameters.name: netaddress
parameters.label: Network Address
parameters.description: The network address of the laser scanner to connect to. The default address of a UST-10LX device is 192.168.0.10.

parameters.name: highsensitivity
parameters.label: High Sensitivity
parameters.description: This check box enables the high sensitivity mode on the sensor. High Sensitivity mode increases the detection ability of the laser scanner, but with a higher chance of measurement error. Only availabl

parameters.name: motorspeed
parameters.label: Motor Speed
parameters.description: Modifies the motor speed of the laser scanner. This should be used when running multiple laser scanners in the same environment. Different motor speeds across multiple laser scanners will avoid light

parameters.name: startstep
parameters.label: Start Step
parameters.description: Specifies the first data point of the laser scan. Start step must be a number between first and last measurement point, and must be less than or equal to the end step parameter. Refer to the above tab

parameters.name: endstep
parameters.label: End Step
parameters.description: Specifies the last data point of the laser scan. End step must be a number between first and last measurement point, and must be greater than or equal to the start step parameter. Refer to the above t

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output
parameters.description: Outputs the scan data in either Polar or Cartesian coordinates.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
